metadata.name: Run a Flash Sale on Merchandise

description: To clear out old inventory, a team's marketing department wants to run a 24-hour flash sale on last season's merchandise.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific items to be included in the sale.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has a list of all items from last season.

nodes.task_description: Apply a discount to all the selected items in the e-commerce system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies a 50% discount to all sale items.

nodes.task_description: Announce the flash sale on social media and through an email blast to fans.
